text: Can smartphones help explain the drop in birth rates? - NPR

text: Kennedy Center board seeks pause of ruling ordering removal of Trump's name - NPR
fullText: President Trump's board at the Kennedy Center is mounting a last-minute effort to keep his name on the facade of the performing arts facility before a court-ordered deadline to remove it by Friday.

text: Hwang In-beom sparks South Korea’s 2-1 comeback win over the Czech Republic at the World Cup - AP News
fullText: Hwang In-beom has led South Korea to a 2-1 comeback win over the Czech Republic in the World Cup. Hwang scored the Koreans' first goal and assisted on Oh Hyeon-gyu’s decisive strike in a game played in front of hundreds of empty seats at Mexico's Guadalajara …

text: Olivia Rodrigo, pop princess of vengeful angst, tries her hand at love songs - NPR
fullText: Ditching the punchy pop punk of Guts to play with a soft '80s pop and New Wave-indebted sound, her new LP is about the life cycle of her first "real, big girl" relationship. The result is bittersweet.
